text: SDLC is the structured process for planning, creating, testing, and deploying software. Phases: Planning → Requirements → Design → Implementation → Testing → Deployment → Maintenance. Models: Waterfall (sequential), Agile (iterative), DevOps (continuous). SDLC reduces risk, manages complexity, and ensures quality.
Agile: iterative sprints (1-4 weeks), continuous feedback — works for evolving requirements.
